title: Bon Clay’s Power Is Revealed

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Kingdom of Alabasta Port City, "Nanohana"

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Looks like there's some kind of ruckus going on in that store...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What happened?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Apparently some customer died all of a sudden.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ah, sergeant!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: CAPTAAIN! Capt. Smoker!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: You'll never guess who showed up in this town!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I heard he suddenly died while in the midst of a conversation with the restaurant owner.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Since he's a traveller...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Some of the people think he might have unknowingly eaten the "Desert Strawberry"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The Desert Strawberry?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the nickname for the poisonous spider whose body looks just like a red strawberry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Its poison will cause an abrupt death several days after.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And for several hours following death,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The poison spreads throughout the entire body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So that's why no one's dared to approach him yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...There's a lot of unknown dangers in the desert that can take your life.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Look. His arm froze up at the exact moment,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: He was about to raise it up to his mouth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's no wonder the venom of the Desert Strawberry,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is the stuff of legends...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PFFET!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhh! He came back to life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: A-are you alright?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mmm,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kyaaaa!
